author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. Per the 2026-04-30 02:51 audit comment: 'Audit complete. Methodology: extracted pub fns/structs from each ferray crate src/, dumped numpy 2.4.4 __all__ per submodule, diffed. Findings: ferray-fft and ferray-linalg are 100% covered; ferray-core/ufunc/stats are mostly there with named gaps; ferray-ma is the lowest-coverage crate (~30%). Full gap report delivered.' The audit deliverable is the gap report itself; subsequent implementation work lives in per-crate parity issues filed since. Closing now.
